inputs.label: Wavelength
inputs.businessContext: Wavelength of the waves (assumed identical for both sources)

inputs.label: Path Difference
inputs.businessContext: Difference in path lengths from the two sources to the point of interest

formulas.resultantAmplitude: Math.sqrt(inputs.amplitude1**2 + inputs.amplitude2**2 + 2 * inputs.amplitude1 * inputs.amplitude2 * Math.cos(2 * Math.PI * inputs.pathDifference / inputs.wavelength))
formulas.intensity: Math.pow(Math.sqrt(inputs.amplitude1**2 + inputs.amplitude2**2 + 2 * inputs.amplitude1 * inputs.amplitude2 * Math.cos(2 * Math.PI * inputs.pathDifference / inputs.wavelength)), 2)
